MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS ARTHUR A. LEVY AND LAW OFFICES OF ARTHUR A. LEVY'S MOTION TO COMPEL AND MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER.

APPEARANCES: David C. Anderson, Esq. of Law Office of David C. Anderson 395-9833 for pltf & opposing party; Christina A. Lee, Esq. of Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP 362-6000 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court continued the matter to 08/03/11 for parties to meet & confer in an attempt to resolve issues. Defendant may submit a letter to the Court by 08/01/11 re status/update. Court will stay $2,500.00 sanctions award and reconsider on 08/03/11. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
